title: halt_audit.log JSONL line schema
description: P0-ENGINE-HALTSESSION-STUCK-FIX (2026-05-19) — Forensic halt_audit.log JSONL record schema. Every line written by `crate::halt_audit::record_halt_set` and `record_halt_cleared` must validate against this schema. Schema version v1 carries the spec §5.1 quant-context fields (6 fields + schema_version).

schema_version.description: JSON Schema version of this record. Bump on any breaking change to fields.

ts_ms.description: Wall-clock ms (UNIX epoch) when the audit row was emitted.

ts_iso.description: ISO-8601 UTC string with millisecond precision (RFC 3339).

event.description: Event type — matches V098 governance_audit_log CHECK allowlist subset.

kind.description: Halt classification (HaltKind serialized lowercase). Stable ABI: do not reorder or rename.

reason.description: Original HaltSession reason string (only set on halt_session_set).

engine_mode.description: Effective engine_mode tag (paper / demo / live / live_demo / live_testnet).

process_pid.description: Engine OS process PID at time of emission.

peak_balance.description: PaperState peak_balance at halt set (set events only).

current_balance.description: PaperState balance at halt set (set events only).

daily_loss_pct.description: IntentProcessor daily_loss_pct at halt set. May be null if engine accessor unavailable.

risk_config_source.description: Reserved for future: TOML path that produced the loaded RiskConfig. Null in v1.

risk_config_version_seen.description: ModeState.risk_config_version_seen at halt set. May be 0 placeholder pending accessor wire-up.

cleared_ts_ms.description: When the halt was cleared (clear events only).

elapsed_ms.description: now_ms - halt_set_ts_ms at clear (clear events only).

clear_path.description: How the halt was cleared (clear events only).

per_symbol_drawdown_max_pct.description: MUST-2 quant-context: maximum per-symbol drawdown pct contributing to halt.

per_symbol_drawdown_max_symbol.description: MUST-2 quant-context: which symbol owns per_symbol_drawdown_max_pct.

consecutive_loss_max_count.description: MUST-2 quant-context: max consecutive loss count across active strategies.

correlated_exposure_pct.description: MUST-2 quant-context: aggregate correlated exposure pct at halt.

paper_state_recompute_ok.description: MUST-2 quant-context: peak_balance monotonically non-decreasing sanity check.

paper_state_balance_history.description: MUST-2 quant-context: last 10 (ts, balance) tuples reconstructing daily_loss_pct path. v1 may emit shorter (peak+current) until PaperState API exposes full history.

per_strategy_drawdown_contribution_pct.description: MUST-2 quant-context: strategy_name → contribution pct map.

per_symbol_atr_pct.description: MUST-2 quant-context: last 5 active symbols → ATR pct map.
